signals.raw:
Based on the available search results, there is **no breaking news or recent announcements** that would move prediction markets as of April 18, 2026.

The most recent data points are from April 17, 2026, showing Ethereum trading at $2,358.26[2], and April 15, 2026, reporting a price of $2,332.52[1]. These represent normal market movements rather than confirmed announcements or resolved events.

signals.headline: Iran x Israel/US Conflict End Markets Draw Attention** | NO | MED
signals.raw:
Iran x Israel/US Conflict End Markets Draw Attention** | NO | MED  
Markets like “Iran x Israel/US conflict ends by...?” at 97% and “Trump announces US x Iran ceasefire broken by...?” at 11% show strong trader conviction amid 1346 X-related markets ($121M volume), hinting at potential smart money positioning—no confirmed resolutions or X-discussed whale moves reported.[1]
